Starting from a pre-trained model, we extend the byte-level BPE tokenizer to cover 230 Ge'ez characters and introduce Word-Aware Loss Weighting to resolve systematic word-boundary failures that arise when applying Latin-centric BPE conventions to a new script. The unmodified model produces no usable output on Ge'ez text. After adaptation, the TrOCR-Printed variant achieves 0.22% Character Error Rate and 97.20% exact match accuracy on a held-out test set of 5,000 synthetic images from the GLOCR dataset. An ablation study confirms that Word-Aware Loss Weighting is the critical component, reducing CER by two orders of magnitude compared to vocabulary extension alone. The full pipeline trains in under three hours on a single 8 GB consumer GPU. All code, model weights, and evaluation scripts are publicly released.

AI.tldr: 本研究首次将TrOCR模型适配到使用吉兹文字的提格里尼亚语印刷体OCR，通过扩展分词器和提出词汇感知损失加权方法，实现了0.22%的字符错误率，训练仅需单张8GB GPU三小时。
AI.motivation: 基于Transformer的OCR模型在拉丁文和中日韩文字上表现优异，但在非洲音节文字系统（特别是使用吉兹文字的提格里尼亚语）的应用仍然有限。
AI.method: 从预训练模型出发，扩展字节级BPE分词器以覆盖230个吉兹字符，并引入词汇感知损失加权方法来解决将拉丁文中心BPE约定应用于新文字时出现的系统性词边界失败问题。
AI.result: 未修改模型在吉兹文本上无法产生可用输出；适配后TrOCR-Printed变体在5000张合成图像测试集上达到0.22%字符错误率和97.20%完全匹配准确率，词汇感知损失加权相比仅词汇扩展使CER降低两个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了TrOCR在非洲音节文字上的成功适配，词汇感知损失加权是关键组件，完整训练流程在消费级GPU上高效完成，所有资源已公开发布。

title: Global Offshore Wind Infrastructure: Deployment and Operational Dynamics from Dense Sentinel-1 Time Series
summary: The offshore wind energy sector is expanding rapidly, increasing the need for independent, high-temporal-resolution monitoring of infrastructure deployment and operation at global scale. While Earth Observation based offshore wind infrastructure mapping has matured for spatial localization, existing open datasets lack temporally dense and semantically fine-grained information on construction and operational dynamics. We introduce a global Sentinel-1 synthetic aperture radar (SAR) time series data corpus that resolves deployment and operational phases of offshore wind infrastructure from 2016Q1 to 2025Q1. Building on an updated object detection workflow, we compile 15,606 time series at detected infrastructure locations, with overall 14,840,637 events as analysis-ready 1D SAR backscatter profiles, one profile per Sentinel-1 acquisition and location. To enable direct use and benchmarking, we release (i) the analysis ready 1D SAR profiles, (ii) event-level baseline semantic labels generated by a rule-based classifier, and (iii) an expert-annotated benchmark dataset of 553 time series with 328,657 event labels. The baseline classifier achieves a macro F1 score of 0.84 in event-wise evaluation and an area under the collapsed edit similarity-quality threshold curve (AUC) of 0.785, indicating temporal coherence. We demonstrate that the resulting corpus supports global-scale analyses of deployment dynamics, the identification of differences in regional deployment patterns, vessel interactions, and operational events, and provides a reference for developing and comparing time series classification methods for offshore wind infrastructure monitoring.

AI.tldr: 研究构建了全球海上风电基础设施监测的Sentinel-1 SAR时间序列数据集，包含2016-2025年期间15606个时间序列的1484万个观测事件，并发布了分析就绪的数据、语义标签和专家标注基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 海上风电能源行业快速扩张，迫切需要在全球范围内对基础设施部署和运营进行独立、高时间分辨率的监测。现有开放数据集缺乏时间密集和语义细粒度的建设和运营动态信息。
AI.method: 基于更新后的目标检测工作流程，构建了Sentinel-1 SAR时间序列语料库，包含检测到的15606个基础设施位置的时间序列，每个位置和每次采集生成一个1D SAR后向散射剖面。使用基于规则的分类器生成基线语义标签，并完成了553个时间序列的专家标注。
AI.result: 基线分类器在事件级评估中达到0.84的宏F1分数，时间连贯性AUC达到0.785。数据集支持全球部署动态分析、区域部署模式差异识别、船舶交互和运营事件分析。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为海上风电基础设施监测提供了重要的全球尺度时间序列资源，支持开发和比较时间序列分类方法，为相关领域的深入研究奠定了数据基础。

title: DeVI: Physics-based Dexterous Human-Object Interaction via Synthetic Video Imitation
summary: Recent advances in video generative models enable the synthesis of realistic human-object interaction videos across a wide range of scenarios and object categories, including complex dexterous manipulations that are difficult to capture with motion capture systems. While the rich interaction knowledge embedded in these synthetic videos holds strong potential for motion planning in dexterous robotic manipulation, their limited physical fidelity and purely 2D nature make them difficult to use directly as imitation targets in physics-based character control. We present DeVI (Dexterous Video Imitation), a novel framework that leverages text-conditioned synthetic videos to enable physically plausible dexterous agent control for interacting with unseen target objects. To overcome the imprecision of generative 2D cues, we introduce a hybrid tracking reward that integrates 3D human tracking with robust 2D object tracking. Unlike methods relying on high-quality 3D kinematic demonstrations, DeVI requires only the generated video, enabling zero-shot generalization across diverse objects and interaction types. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DeVI outperforms existing approaches that imitate 3D human-object interaction demonstrations, particularly in modeling dexterous hand-object interactions. We further validate the effectiveness of DeVI in multi-object scenes and text-driven action diversity, showcasing the advantage of using video as an HOI-aware motion planner.

AI.tldr: DeVI是一个利用文本条件合成视频实现灵巧机器人操作控制的新框架，通过混合跟踪奖励机制克服2D视频的物理不确定性，实现零样本泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频生成模型虽然能合成逼真的人物交互视频，但其物理保真度有限且纯2D特性使其难以直接用于基于物理的角色控制模仿学习。需要一种方法能够利用这些合成视频中丰富的交互知识来实现灵巧的机器人操作。
AI.method: 提出DeVI框架，结合3D人体跟踪和鲁棒2D对象跟踪的混合跟踪奖励机制。仅需生成的合成视频作为输入，无需高质量的3D运动学演示，通过文本条件实现跨对象和交互类型的零样本泛化。
AI.result: 实验表明DeVI在建模灵巧手-对象交互方面优于现有的3D人-对象交互演示模仿方法，并在多对象场景和文本驱动的动作多样性中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: DeVI成功地将合成2D视频转化为物理合理的灵巧代理控制，为利用视频作为HOI感知的运动规划器提供了新思路，显著提升了在复杂交互场景中的泛化能力和控制精度。
